purpose: SOC investigation agent. Pulls and correlates security logs, drafts incident hypotheses, assigns dispositions. All read-only or reversible. No actuation. Matches the architecture Anthropic describes in their CLUE SecOps blog: investigation (read) is reversible, actuation (write) is a different floor.

actions.name: query_siem
actions.description: Run a query against the SIEM. Returns events.

actions.name: correlate_events
actions.description: Correlate events from multiple sources into a single timeline.

actions.name: draft_hypothesis
actions.description: Draft an incident hypothesis as a markdown document. Stored as a draft only.

actions.name: assign_disposition
actions.description: Assign a disposition label (true_positive, false_positive, needs_review) to the case. Reversible by analyst review.
